allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d['name']\) for d in data if 'sioux' in d['name'].lower\(\) or 'Sioux' in d['name']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json nb = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\) for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\): if cell['cell_type'] == 'code' and cell.get\('outputs'\): for out in cell['outputs']: if out.get\('text'\): text = ''.join\(out['text']\) if any\(k in text.lower\(\) for k in ['rel_gap', 'gap', 'time', 'iter', 'リンクフロー差']\): print\(f'--- Cell {i} output ---'\) print\(text\) ")
